title: pany-kids-studio
description: 🌸 5-year family learning dashboard with AI mentor Đại Ka. Bilingual VN+EN. Built for kids 6 -16.
summary: A bilingual (Vietnamese and English) family learning dashboard designed for children aged 6-16, featuring an AI mentor named Đại Ka and tracking learning progress over five years. The project focuses on personalized, long-term educational support for kids.
